title: HG 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner, Premium Real Leather & Faux Leather Cleaner, Leather Conditioner to Restore & Nourish Soft Furniture & Accessories, Effective Leather Polish - 250ml
features: HG Leather Cleaner: Cleans, nourishes, protects and enhances leather furniture and accessories. 4-in-1 leather cleaning solution also helps strengthen the colour and structure of the leather

Leather sofa cleaner: Leather protector for the home or vehicle. A leather sofa restorer and car upholstery cleaner, also suitable for keeping leather chairs, bed frames and furniture in top condition
Safe and gentle on all types of aniline or coloured leather: Ideal for cleaning, polishing, restoring and adding a protective, anti-stain layer to handbags, shoes, settees, chairs or footstools
Colour enhancer: The colour and structure of the leather are enriched, making it look almost new again. Ensures leather remains supple and fully protected against dirt, stains and perspiration
Includes: 1 x HG 4in1 Leather Protector, 250ml. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, from clothing stain removers to multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner cleans, nourishes, protects and maintains leather furniture and accessories, for leather reconditioning. The leather cleaner and conditioner helps real leather surfaces to remain supple and fully protected against dirt, stains and perspiration. The protective cleaner for leather also strengthens the colour and structure, leaving it beautifully clean, shiny and polished after just one treatment. Leather is a natural product and can dry out, so regular leather conditioning is essential. This water-based leather protector and furniture polish is developed specially for looking after full aniline and coloured leather on furniture, suitcases, briefcases, belts, car seats, shoes and bags. Includes: 1 x HG 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner (250ml) How to use: 1. Use a cloth or sponge to gently rub it into the material 2. After about 10 minutes polish with a soft cloth, without using any pressure, for perfectly cleaned and nourished leather. Keep out of reach of children. Always read the label. Test on a discrete area before first use. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist cleaning products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Ingredients 1,2-benzisothiazol-3(2H)-one; 1,2-benzisothiazolin-3-one (2634-33-5) (00178), 2-methylisothiazol-3(2H)-one (2682-20-4) (00180). May produce an allergic reaction Box Contains 1 x HG 4 in 1 for Leather 0.25L See more
